parametrized_description: A scientist is conducting A different experiments to produce electricity. Each experiment i produces E[i] units of electricity and requires specific amounts of B types of resources as defined by D[j][i]. The laboratory has C[j] units of each resource available. The scientist aims to determine the number of each experiment to conduct in order to maximize the total electricity produced.

E.description: Quantity of electrical output generated by experiment i

D.description: Quantity of resource j needed for conducting experiment i

a.description: The frequency each experiment is carried out

z.description: New variable representing the objective function

constraints.description: Constraint defining z in terms of original variables.
constraints.formulation: z = quicksum(a[i] * E[i] for i in range(A))

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(z == quicksum(a[i] * E[i] for i in range(A)))

constraints.description: The amount of metal needed for all tests doesn't surpass the metal that's readily accessible.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(D[0][i] * a[i] for i in range(A)) <= C[0])

constraints.description: The acid necessary for every experiment is not more than the acid that's available.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(D['acid'][i] * a[i] for i in range(A)) <= C['acid'])
